channel.title: Leadership on Rasagy Sharma | Design Leader, Data Artist, Design Educator & Sketchnoter
channel.description: Recent content in Leadership on Rasagy Sharma | Design Leader, Data Artist, Design Educator & Sketchnoter

item.title: Panel on Claude for Everyone
item.description: I was invited to join a panel discussion at India’s first Claude Code Community Meetup, that expanded from Claude Code Central London to Bengaluru (& a few more Indian cities). The panel was largely around how different roles & organizations are adopting Claude Code, and AI in general. Photo of CCCL BLR #1, with the panel discussion going on. This year, I have been diving deep into Claude Code for my personal experiments, leading the AI & Product Leadership initiative at Capital One India & also introducing AI in my creative coding courses.

item.title: Panel on Vibe Architects: How Leaders Build & Sustain Creative Energy
item.description: I was invited to join a panel discussion at Design Days 2025 in Bangalore, organized by Salesforce. The panel was on how design leaders define, build & nurture culture, and inevitably discussed how AI is changing the way we work. Photo of Panel on Culture at Design Days 2025 Design Days is an annual design event held by Salesforce, with an interesting hybrid & cross-city schedule. This year, it was held in BIC, Bengaluru, along with parallel editions in Hyderabad & Singapore.
